'''radoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherstitch|featherstitch]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherstitch|featherstitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| radoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædeheth|rædeheth]] || [[word:rædehej|rædehej]] || [[word:rædehesh|rædehesh]] || [[word:rædehe|rædehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:radodohoth|radodohoth]] || [[word:radodohoj|radodohoj]] || [[word:radodohosh|radodohosh]] || [[word:radodoho|radodoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:radohoth|radohoth]] || [[word:radohoj|radohoj]] || [[word:radohosh|radohosh]] || [[word:radoho|radoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:radofhoth|radofhoth]] || [[word:radofhoj|radofhoj]] || [[word:radofhosh|radofhosh]] || [[word:radofhof|radofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radohotho|radohotho]] || [[word:radohojo|radohojo]] || [[word:radohosho|radohosho]] || [[word:radohoko|radohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radohoth|radohoth]] || [[word:radohoj|radohoj]] || [[word:radohosh|radohosh]] || [[word:radoho|radoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radohothol|radohothol]] || [[word:radohojol|radohojol]] || [[word:radohoshol|radohoshol]] || [[word:radohokol|radohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radohothotho|radohothotho]] || [[word:radohojojo|radohojojo]] || [[word:radohoshosho|radohoshosho]] || [[word:radohoko|radohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radohothon|radohothon]] || [[word:radohojon|radohojon]] || [[word:radohoshon|radohoshon]] || [[word:radohokon|radohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radohothoro|radohothoro]] || [[word:radohojoro|radohojoro]] || [[word:radohoshoro|radohoshoro]] || [[word:radohokoro|radohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
